event: past medical history of relapsing urinary tract infection
admitted to the intensive care unit
initial echocardiography revealed severe acute cor pulmonale
electrocardiogram showed transient ST segment elevation in anteroseptal leads
coronary angiogram revealed atheromatous coronary arteries
abdominal computed tomography revealed gas collection in parenchyma
gas in vein of left kidney
control echocardiography at day-1 showed no acute cor pulmonale
control echocardiography at day-1 showed no akinesia
multiple gas emboli in pulmonary artery
Klebsiella pneumoniae isolated in kidney cultures
